name: apple-reminders
description: Read, write, and manage reminders in Apple Reminders via EventKit
long_description: This extension allows Claude to interact with your macOS Reminders app: list reminder lists, create/update/complete/delete reminders, and run smart queries (today, overdue, scheduled, full-text search). It uses Apple's native EventKit framework directly via a bundled Swift binary, making it 10-200× faster than AppleScript-based alternatives. It requires your explicit permission through the macOS Reminders privacy prompt before accessing your data. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by Apple Inc.

tools.name: get_lists
tools.description: List all reminder lists with open and completed counts

tools.name: get_list_info
tools.description: Get info about a single reminder list by name

tools.name: list_reminders
tools.description: List reminders in a specific list, filtered by open/completed/all

tools.name: search_reminders
tools.description: Full-text search across all reminder lists

tools.name: get_today
tools.description: Get reminders due today across all lists

tools.name: get_overdue
tools.description: Get overdue open reminders across all lists

tools.name: get_scheduled
tools.description: Get all open reminders that have a due date

tools.name: get_reminder
tools.description: Fetch a single reminder by its stable EventKit ID

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Create a new reminder in a specified list

tools.name: update_reminder
tools.description: Update an existing reminder by ID
